direct_access.title: Internal SSO
direct_access.description: This is an internal Single Sign-On service. It is not intended to be accessed directly — your application will redirect you here automatically when sign-in is required.

sign_in.title: Sign in
sign_in.description: Enter your email and password to sign in

sign_up.title: Create an account
sign_up.description: Enter your details to create an account

recover_password.title: Recover your password
recover_password.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
recover_password.success_message: If an account exists for that address, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.

reset_password.title: Set a new password
reset_password.description: Enter a new password for your account.
reset_password.invalid_link: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

errors.email_taken: An account with this email already exists
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
